package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for json_marshaled_manually_then_c_data: Handlers that manually marshal JSON and then write it through gin.Context.Data(...).
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule320NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule320NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule320NegativeRecord) (Rule320NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario320Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule320NegativeService, input Rule320NegativeRecord) (Rule320NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule320NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
